prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约5545→7118→11370→13853→15294名，呈持续大幅后移趋势，近4年累计后移约9749名；2025年基准约15294名，为近5年最高位次（数 字最大），竞争持续加剧；本省物理类计划2021年67人、2022年61人、2023年62人、2024年63人、2025年63人；2026年计划68人，较2025年增加5人（扩 招约7.9%），扩招对竞争有一定缓解作用，但位次后移趋势强劲。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜2026年第42名（近年稳定在44–46名），排名略 有上升，属顶尖财经类院校，对考生吸引力稳定；2023年声誉评价偏负面（新闻传播学类专业投档位次下滑），但2026年周期内无显著声誉事件；抖音热度总排 名第97位，评价"一般"，短视频曝光量偏低；历史投档异常仅2023年低关注，影响有限；应用经济学A、理论经济学A-，与该校金融学类、财政学类、经济学类 等物理类招生专业高度对应，学科实力对相关专业报考有正向支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业社会热度2024年评估为"分化观望"，较2023年小幅升温；电子信息/通信"高热推荐"、电气工程"高热推荐"、计算机类"推荐"，工科类专业热度持续走高，可能分流部分物理类高分考生。本省2026年物理类 考生456,000人，较2025年440,208人增加约3.6%，考生规模扩大，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续大幅后移趋势、2026年扩招约7. 9%但本省物理类考生增加约3.6%，以及工科热门专业分流效应，预计2026年竞争较2025年继续加剧但幅度有所放缓。预测最低位次约16072名，区间15572–16572名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 数字经济（成思危拔尖班）
- 金融科技（北航计算机联培）
- 金融学（含北外英语联培）
- 税收学（北理工智能、税收联培）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 经济与贸易类（国际经济与贸易、国际商务、贸易经济）
- 金融学类（金融工程、金融科技）
- 经济学类（经济学、国民经济管理）
- 精算学
- 工商管理类（商学院）（工商管理、市场营销大数据营销、人力资源管理、供应链管理）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 信息管理与信息系统
- 金融学（国际金融与公司理财）
- 工商管理类（会计学院）（会计学、财务管理）
- 投资学（含大数据双学位）
- 经济学（数理经济与数理金融）
- 财政学类（财政学、税收学、资产评估、财政基础理论基地班、全球税收治理菁英班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间15572–16572名内，建议以二档专业（经济与贸易类、金融学类、经济学类、精算学）为主攻方向，一档（数字经济拔尖班、金融科技联培、金融学）作为冲刺， 三档（财政学类、会计学院、投资学）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（15572名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 5545 → 7118 → 11370 → 13853 → 15294, showing a continuous and significant downward trend, with a cumulative decline of about 9749 positions over the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 15294, the highest ranking (largest number) in the past 5 years, indicating intensifying competition; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 67 in 2021, 61 in 2022, 62 in 2023, 63 in 2024, and 63 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 68, an increase of 5 from 2025 (an expansion of about 7.9%), which somewhat alleviates competition, but the downward trend in rankings remains strong.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 42nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking (stable around 44–46 in recent years), with a slight rise, making it a top-tier finance and economics institution with stable appeal to candidates; the 2023 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (the Journalism and Communication major saw a decline in application rankings), but no significant reputation events occurred in the 2026 cycle; Douyin popularity ranked 97th overall, with an evaluation of 'average' and low short video exposure; historical application anomalies only occurred in 2023 with low attention, having limited impact; Applied Economics is rated A, Theoretical Economics A-, which highly correspond to the Physics Category enrollment majors such as Finance, Public Finance, and Economics, providing positive support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Finance/Economics/Economic majors in 2024 was assessed as 'differentiated and wait-and-see', slightly warming compared to 2023; Electronics/Communication is 'highly recommended', Electrical Engineering is 'highly recommended', Computer Science is 'recommended', with engineering majors' popularity continuing to rise, potentially diverting some high-scoring Physics Category candidates. In 2026, the province has 456,000 Physics Category candidates, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,208 in 2025, expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous and significant downward trend in historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 7.9% but a 3.6% increase in provincial Physics Category candidates, and the diversion effect of popular engineering majors, competition in 2026 is expected to continue intensifying compared to 2025, but at a slower pace. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 16072, with a range of 15572–16572.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Digital Economy (Cheng Siwei Top-Notch Class)
- Financial Technology (Joint Training with Beihang University Computer Science)
- Finance (Including Joint Training with Beijing Foreign Studies University English)
- Taxation (Joint Training with Beijing Institute of Technology Smart and Taxation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Economics and Trade (International Economics and Trade, International Business, Trade Economics)
- Finance (Financial Engineering, Financial Technology)
- Economics (Economics, National Economic Management)
- Actuarial Science
- Business Administration (School of Business) (Business Administration, Marketing Big Data Marketing, Human Resource Management, Supply Chain Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Information Management and Information Systems
- Finance (International Finance and Corporate Finance)
- Business Administration (School of Accounting) (Accounting, Financial Management)
- Investment (Including Big Data Dual Degree)
- Economics (Mathematical Economics and Mathematical Finance)
- Public Finance (Public Finance, Taxation, Asset Evaluation, Public Finance Basic Theory Base Class, Global Tax Governance Elite Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 15572–16572, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Economics and Trade, Finance, Economics, Actuarial Science) as the main direction, with Tier 1 (Digital Economy Top-Notch Class, Financial Technology Joint Training, Finance) as a reach, and Tier 3 (Public Finance, School of Accounting, Investment) as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 15572), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1827 → 1981 → 1806 → 2019 → 2324, showing a fluctuating and backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 518 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 2324, the highest ranking (largest number) in the past 5 years, indicating intensifying competition; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 31 in 2021, 32 in 2022, 33 in 2023, 35 in 2024, and 38 in 2025, with a gradual small expansion each year; the 2026 plan is 38, unchanged from 2025, with no clear signal of eased competition at the plan level.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 42nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking (stable at 44–46 in recent years), with a slight rise, belonging to top-tier finance and economics institutions, with stable appeal to candidates; the 2023 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (declining application rankings for Journalism and Communication majors), but no significant reputation events occurred in the 2026 cycle; Douyin popularity total ranking is 97th, with an evaluation of 'average', low short video exposure, no high-attention signal; the only historical application anomaly was low attention in 2023, with limited impact; Applied Economics is rated A, Theoretical Economics A-, both core disciplines in finance and economics, highly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Finance, Public Finance, and Economics, providing positive support for applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Finance/Economics/Economic majors in 2024 is assessed as 'divergent and wait-and-see', slightly warming compared to 2023 but with both recommendations and dissuasions; Law popularity is 'divergent and wait-and-see'; Accounting/Auditing/Finance is 'recommended'; Journalism and Communication is 'clearly dissuaded'. The provincial History Category candidates in 2026 are 326,200, an increase of about 11.6% from 292,200 in 2025, with a significant expansion of the candidate pool, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, and the significant increase of about 11.6% in provincial History Category candidates, along with the divergent popularity of finance and economics majors but the strong appeal of Central University of Finance and Economics as a top finance and economics institution, competition is expected to further intensify in 2026 compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2354, with a range of 2001–2707.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 2001), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
